info.name: amvision workflow 11 industrial local directory poll detection position gate
info.description: 第十一类 directory-poll TriggerSource 调试 collection。directory-poll 负责固定周期目录轮询、稳定期过滤、checkpoint 恢复和 batch 提交；workflow app 只接收标准化目录批次 payload 与 event，并通过静态 deployment_request 驱动 detection 工业位置门控链。直接 Invoke 的请求体使用 synthetic trigger event payload，用于本地调试同一条业务链。

request.description: 创建 industrial_local_directory_poll_detection_position_gate 的编辑态 preview run。这里直接用 synthetic directory-poll payload 和 event 做本地调试，不需要真实目录监听常驻线程。
读取上一步 preview run 的 outputs 和 node_records。
创建 directory-poll TriggerSource 使用的正式 runtime。
确认 runtime 已经处于 running。
直接用 synthetic directory-poll 事件调用同一个 runtime，验证业务处理链本身和静态 deployment_request 绑定。
创建同一条 directory-poll 目录事件处理链的正式 async workflow run。
读取上一步正式 WorkflowRun 的状态、outputs 和事件摘要。
创建 directory-poll TriggerSource。当前请求体同时演示原始 payload/event 映射和静态 deployment_request 注入。

body.raw:
{
    "trigger_source_id":  "directory-poll-trigger-source-11",
    "project_id":  "project-1",
    "display_name":  "Directory Poll TriggerSource 11 Industrial Detection Position Gate",
    "trigger_kind":  "directory-poll",
    "workflow_runtime_id":  "{{workflowRuntimeId}}",
    "submit_mode":  "async",
    "enabled":  false,
    "transport_config":  {
                             "directory_path":  "D:/cases/line-e/incoming",
                             "recursive":  false,
                             "include_hidden":  false,
                             "glob_pattern":  "*",
                             "extensions":  [
                                                "png",
                                                "jpg",
                                                "jpeg"
                                            ],
                             "sort_by":  "modified_time",
                             "descending":  false,
                             "dedupe_by":  "path",
                             "batch_size":  4,
                             "scan_interval_seconds":  1,
                             "min_stable_age_seconds":  1.0,
                             "persist_checkpoint":  true
                         },
    "input_binding_mapping":  {
                                  "request_trigger_payload":  {
                                                                  "source":  "payload",
                                                                  "payload_type_id":  "response-body.v1"
                                                              },
                                  "request_trigger_event":  {
                                                                "source":  "event",
                                                                "payload_type_id":  "response-body.v1"
                                                            },
                                  "deployment_request":  {
                                                             "value":  {
                                                                           "value":  {
                                                                                         "deployment_instance_id":  "{{deploymentInstanceId}}"
                                                                                     }
                                                                       },
                                                             "payload_type_id":  "value.v1"
                                                         }
                              },
    "result_mapping":  {
                           "result_binding":  "batch_record",
                           "result_mode":  "accepted-then-query"
                       },
    "default_execution_metadata":  {
                                       "scenario":  "industrial-local-directory-poll-detection-position-gate",
                                       "trigger_source":  "directory-poll",
                                       "trace_level":  "none",
                                       "retain_trace_enabled":  false,
                                       "retain_node_records_enabled":  false
                                   },
    "ack_policy":  "ack-after-run-created",
    "result_mode":  "accepted-then-query",
    "debounce_window_ms":  0,
    "idempotency_key_path":  "payload.batch_id",
    "metadata":  {
                     "example_kind":  "industrial-local-directory-poll-detection-position-gate",
                     "station_id":  "line-e-01",
                     "line_id":  "line-e"
                 }
}

request.description: 读取 directory-poll TriggerSource 的 health，重点关注 adapter_running、checkpoint_path 和 known_identity_count。
删除当前 TriggerSource；如果需要重新绑定新的 runtime、deployment 或目录路径，可在这一步后重新执行 Create TriggerSource。
结束本次 runtime 调试。
